topBriefs.title: SOC2 Evidence Automation for Small AI Vendors
Data Pipeline Reliability for Lean Teams

marketTrendLabels: LLM quality work is shifting from benchmarks to regression operations
Usage pricing keeps creating billing and revenue-ops reconciliation pain
Enterprise readiness is moving earlier for small AI and SaaS vendors
Agent workflows need replay, human handoff, auditability, and local context boundaries
Local-first AI memory is becoming a visible privacy and governance surface

nextRecommendedValidationStep: Interview teams shipping LLM features and usage-priced API products, then run a paired SOC2/privacy-review discovery sprint with small AI vendors.
